:@.name: key
:@.description:
The Level within the Aspiration Track that this Aspiration
lives.

:@.name: value
:@.description:
The Aspiration within the track that is associated with this
level.

:@.name: aspirations
:@.description:
A mapping between the Aspiration Track Level and the Aspiration
to be completed.  The Aspirations will need to be completed in
order and upon the final one being complete will have this
Aspiration Track be considered complete.

:@.name: category
:@.description: The Aspiration Category that this Aspiration Track is a part of.

:@.name: description_text
:@.description: The Aspiration Track's description.

:@.name: display_text
:@.description: The Aspiration Track's name.

:@.name: icon
:@.description: The Aspiration Track's icon.

:@.name: icon_high_res
:@.description:
The icon to be displayed in aspiration track selection.
The Aspiration Track's icon for display when selecting a track.

:@.name: is_hidden_unlockable
:@.description:
If True, this track will be initially hidden until unlocked
during gameplay.
Note: It will never be able to be selected in CAS, even
if it has been unlocked.

:@.name: event_id
:@.description:
The string associated with the live event to be tested. If that
live event is active, this test will return True.

:@.name: enabled
:@.description: Reason of failure.

:@.name: tooltip
:@.description: Reason of failure.

:@.name: is_live_event_active
:@.description: A tunable test to see if a given live event is active.
A tunable test supporting hidden aspiration testing

:@.name: is_hidden_unlocked_tests
:@.description:
All tests must pass for this track to remain
unlocked on load.  This does NOT unlock it.

Uses GlobalResolver

:@.name: mood_asm_param
:@.description:
The asm parameter for Sim's mood for use with CAS ASM state
machine, driven by selection of this AspirationTrack, i.e. when a
player selects the a romantic aspiration track, the Flirty ASM is
given to the state machine to play. The name tuned here must match
the animation state name parameter expected in Swing.
A localized string that may use tokens.

:@.name: additional_texts
:@.description: If enabled, add additional text to the dialog

:@.name: anonymous_target_sim
:@.description:
DEPRECATED! Please use custom_mask_target_sim instead.
Use InGame/UI/Icons/Dialog/phone_anonymous_caller_icon.png and UI/Gameplay/Phone:UnknownCallerName.

If this dialog is using a target sim id to give a conversation type view and this is checked, then the
target sim icon will instead be replaced by an anonymous caller.

:@.name: audio
:@.description: The sound to play.

:@.name: immediate_audio
:@.description:
If checked, this audio will be triggered immediately, nothing
will block.

ex. Earbuds audio will be played immediately while 
the Sim is routing or animating.

:@.name: enabled
:@.description: The name of the slot this audio is attached to.

:@.name: joint_name_hash
:@.description:
Specify if the audio is attached to a slot and, if so, which
slot. Otherwise the audio will be attached to the object's 
origin.

:@.name: play_on_active_sim_only
:@.description:
If enabled, and audio target is Sim, the audio will only be 
played on selected Sim. Otherwise it will be played regardless 
Sim is selected or not.

If audio target is Object, always set this to False. Otherwise
the audio will never be played.

ex. This will be useful for Earbuds where we want to hear the
music only when the Sim is selected.

:@.name: audio_sting
:@.description: If enabled, play an audio sting when the dialog is shown.

:@.name: enabled
:@.description: The participant of the interaction who will play the audio_sting.

:@.name: audio_sting_owner
:@.description:
If enabled, this will set the owner of the audio sting when the
dialog is shown.

:@.name: auto_delete_reason
:@.description: Specify the notification's auto-delete reason.

:@.name: enabled
:@.description: The background audio event string.

:@.name: background_audio
:@.description: If enabled, play background audio while the dialog is open.

:@.name: enabled
:@.description: The background image for the family portrait.

:@.name: background_image
:@.description:
If enabled, add a background image to the dialog.  This will only 
be used in the case where dialog_bg_style is BG_DYNAMIC_IMAGE.

:@.name: career_reference
:@.description: The Career to override the icon.

:@.name: participant_type
:@.description: The Participant who owns the career.

:@.name: participant_type
:@.description: The Participant who owns the small business we want to get the icon from.

:@.name: participant_type
:@.description: The Participant who owns the lifestyle brand we want to use.

:@.name: participant
:@.description: The Sim who's thumbnail will be used.

:@.name: privacy
:@.description:
Search an interaction's privacy liability to find violating Sims
and randomly select one to display an icon of.

:@.name: participant_type
:@.description: The Participant who's ranked statistic we want to get.

:@.name: ranked_statistic
:@.description: The statistic to find the icon of.

:@.name: key
:@.description: The icon image to be displayed.

:@.name: resource_key
:@.description: The icon image to be displayed.

:@.name: participant_type
:@.description: The Participant is secret for which we want to get the icon from.

:@.name: participant_type
:@.description: The Participant who owns the small business we want to get the icon from.

:@.name: participant_type
:@.description: We use this participant's holiday tracker to get the icon.

:@.name: enabled
:@.description: A localized string that may use tokens.

:@.name: alert_sim_name
:@.description: A localized string that may use tokens.

:@.name: career_reference
:@.description: The Career to override the icon.

:@.name: participant_type
:@.description: The Participant who owns the career.

:@.name: participant_type

:@.name: participant_type

:@.name: participant

:@.name: privacy
:@.description:
Search an interaction's privacy liability to find violating Sims
and randomly select one to display an icon of.

:@.name: participant_type
:@.description: The Participant who's ranked statistic we want to get.

:@.name: ranked_statistic
:@.description: The statistic to find the icon of.

:@.name: key
:@.description: The icon image to be displayed.

:@.name: resource_key
:@.description: The icon image to be displayed.

:@.name: participant_type
:@.description: The Participant is secret for which we want to get the icon from.

:@.name: participant_type
:@.description: The Participant who owns the small business we want to get the icon from.

:@.name: participant_type
:@.description: We use this participant's holiday tracker to get the icon.

:@.name: custom_mask_target_sim
:@.description: When tuned, display the given icon/name for the target Sim instead of the Sim's actual icon/name.

:@.name: dialog_bg_style
:@.description: The style background to apply to this dialog.

:@.name: dialog_footer_type
:@.description:
An enumeration of the type for YES BUTTONS and DIALOG BUTTON footers.
AUTOMATIC lets the code decide which footer to use.
YES_BUTTONS_FOOTER is a footer with an OK BUTTON by default.
DIALOG_BUTTONS_FOOTER is a footer with only DIALOG BUTTONS.

:@.name: dialog_options
:@.description: Options to apply to the dialog.

:@.name: dialog_style
:@.description: The style layout to apply to this dialog.

:@.name: expand_behavior
:@.description: Specify the notification's expand behavior.

:@.name: enabled
:@.description:
The participant to be used as the owner of this dialog. If this
participant doesn't exist, the default owner will be used
instead.

:@.name: icon_override_participant
:@.description:
If enabled, allows a different participant to be considered the
owner of this dialog. Typically, this will only affect the Sim
portrait used at the top of the dialog, but there could be other
adverse affects so be sure to talk to your UI partner before tuning
this.

:@.name: information_level
:@.description: Specify the notification's information level.

:@.name: override_string
:@.description: The alternate text that will be displayed in the TNS.

:@.name: override_text_mapping
:@.description: If enabled, we will override the TNS text depending on age

:@.name: participant
:@.description: This field is deprecated. Please use 'icon' instead.

:@.name: phone_ring_type
:@.description:
The phone ring type of this dialog.  If tuned to anything other
than None this dialog will only appear after clicking on the phone.

:@.name: enabled
:@.description: The button audio event name.

:@.name: audio_event_name
:@.description: If enabled, this is the audio event sent by this button.

:@.name: category_tag
:@.description:
Category tag to filter in build buy mode
Filters include all the buy categories

:@.name: pack_id
:@.description: Pack Id to be filtered in build buy mode

:@.name: enabled
:@.description: Category tag and Pack ID to filter in build buy mode

:@.name: build_buy_filters
:@.description: If enabled, specified category and pack id will be applied in the build buy mode

:@.name: enabled
:@.description: The icon image to be displayed.

:@.name: button_icon
:@.description: If enabled, this is the icon to be shown on this button.

:@.name: dialog_response_id_override
:@.description:
The dialog response id for this response that will override the default response
id. Make sure this is unique for each response.

:@.name: loots
:@.description: A list of loots that will be applied when the player selects this response.

:@.name: enabled
:@.description: Loots to apply for the response and dialog response id that will override the original id.

:@.name: loots_for_response
:@.description: If enabled, specify loots to apply and dialog response id for this response.

:@.name: boolean
:@.description: A boolean value.

:@.name: floating_point
:@.description: A floating point number.

:@.name: integer
:@.description: An integer number.

:@.name: participant
:@.description:
The participant to resolve for this response argument.
The value sent will be the id of the specified participant.
If more than one participant is found, it will only send the id of the first participant found.

:@.name: participant_id
:@.description: UI Response argument that will resolve the participant specified.

:@.name: special_command_data
:@.description:
This will use the data passed into the show_dialog()
function. This must be supported with GPE work, so
only use this if you have talked to a GPE.

:@.name: string
:@.description: A string.
An argument being passed to the command.

:@.name: arguments
:@.description:
The arguments for this command. Arguments will be added after the
command.

:@.name: command
:@.description: The command.

:@.name: literal
:@.description: A UI Response that sends a server command.

:@.name: reference
:@.description: A reference to a UIResponseCommand tuning snippet.

:@.name: enabled
:@.description: This may be tuned in place here using 'literal' or as a reference to a UIResponseCommand tuning snippet.

:@.name: response_command
:@.description: If enabled, specifies a command to be called by the client.

:@.name: enabled
:@.description: The tooltip's text.

:@.name: tooltip_text
:@.description: If enabled, this is the tooltip text to be shown on hover for this button.

:@.name: enabled
:@.description: ID of a Tutorial, TutorialCategory, or TutorialSubcategory to be displayed.

:@.name: tutorial_id
:@.description: If set, this tutorial ID will be used for SHOW_LESSONS requests.

:@.name: enabled
:@.description: Name of a UI message to be sent.

:@.name: ui_message_name
:@.description: If set, this UI message will be used for SEND_UI_MESSAGE requests.

:@.name: argument_name
:@.description: The name of this argument.

:@.name: argument_value
:@.description: The value of this argument.
Arguments for the UI message.

:@.name: ui_message_tuned_args
:@.description:
(Requires Ui Message Name to be tuned.)
If set, these message arguments will be used in SEND_UI_MESSAGE requests.

:@.name: ui_request
:@.description: This prompt's associated UI action.

:@.name: enabled
:@.description: The response associated to the secondary icon.

:@.name: secondary_icon_response
:@.description: If enabled, associate a response to clicking the secondary icon.

:@.name: show_dialog_message_override
:@.description:
If enabled, this will override the dialog message that is sent to
the client when the dialog is shown

:@.name: enabled
:@.description: The dialog's subtitle.

:@.name: subtitle
:@.description: If enabled, this dialog will include subtitle text.

:@.name: literal
:@.description: A localized string that may use tokens.

:@.name: reference
:@.description: A reference to a LocalizedString tuning snippet.
This may be tuned in place here using 'literal' or as a reference to a LocalizedString tuning snippet.

:@.name: concatenation
:@.description: A list of localized string concatenations. These strings will be joined together into single line-separated string

:@.name: single
:@.description: A localized string that may use tokens.
A localized string that may use tokens.

:@.name: variation
:@.description: A list of possible localized string variations.

:@.name: text
:@.description: The dialog's text.

:@.name: enabled
:@.description: The time, in sim minutes, that this dialog should time out.

:@.name: timeout_duration
:@.description:
If enabled, override the timeout duration for this dialog in game
time.

:@.name: enabled
:@.description: The dialog's title.

:@.name: title
:@.description: If enabled, this dialog will include title text.

:@.name: tns_suppression_group
:@.description:
If enabled, the TNS will be considered for suppression. Suppression occurs if the number
of notifications in this group that fire exceed the tuned TNS suppression limit.

A localized string that may use tokens.

:@.name: subtext
:@.description: If tuned, this text will display below the button. Span tags can be used to change the color of the text to green/positive and red/negative. TEXT will make the word TEXT green TEXT will make the word TEXT red

:@.name: text
:@.description: The prompt's text.

:@.description: The tooltip's text.

A dialog response.

:@.name: ui_responses
:@.description: A list of buttons that are mapped to UI commands.

:@.name: urgency
:@.description: Specify the notification's urgency.

:@.name: visual_type
:@.description: Specify the notification's visual treatment.

:@.name: notification
:@.description:
A TNS that will be displayed with the Aspiration Track is
completed.

:@.name: override_traits
:@.description:
Traits that are applied to the sim when they select this
aspiration. Overrides any traits that are on the sim when the
aspiration is selected. This is used for FTUE aspirations.

:@.name: primary_trait
:@.description:
A trait that is given to Sims if this is the Aspiration Track that
was selected for the Sim when they exited CAS for the first time or
is the initial Aspiration Track selected when the Sim ages up from
a child.

:@.name: provided_traits
:@.description:
These traits are added to the sim whenever this aspiration track is set as the sim's
primary aspiration. They will be removed when the this aspiration track is no longer 
the sim's primary aspiration.

:@.name: reward
:@.description:
The rewards that are given when a Sim completes this Aspiration
Track.

:@.name: enabled
:@.description: A Whim Set that is active when this Aspiration Track is active.

:@.name: whim_set
:@.description:
If enabled then this Aspiration Track will give a Whim Set when it
is active.

A collection of Aspirations that must be completed in order.  An Aspiration
Track represents the user facing concept of an Aspiration as an ordered
list of Aspirations that must be completed with unique rewards being given
upon completion of the final Aspiration within the track.

Only a single Aspiration Track may be tracked for completion at a time.
